description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold prints in clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product Details Orange clutch with a main compartment with a zippered pocket, eight card slots and two insert pockets Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Shell: 100% polyurethane and lining: 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 10 cm Width: 19 cm
